input.question: We are a student engineering team designing a vehicle for the FSAE competition. Attached is the FSAE rules document. What does rule D.2.1.3 state exactly? Answer with only the text of the rule and no other words.

retrieved_context:
RULE: d.2.1.3
            TITLE: when the push bar is attached, the engine must stay off, unless authorized by the officials

            CONTENT:
            rule D.2.1.3: When the Push Bar is attached, the engine must stay off, unless authorized by the officials
D.2.1.3 When the Push Bar is attached, the engine must stay off, unless authorized by the officials

final_answer: When the Push Bar is attached, the engine must stay off, unless authorized by the officials
